---
name: "TH6 E3 — Freedom-Preserving Kickoff Controls"
about: "Implement TH6.E3 Freedom-Preserving Kickoff Controls"
labels: [epic, TH6, E3]
assignees: [copilot]
---

- [ ] US1 — Add explicit no-kickoff and minimal-kickoff controls: let callers request less graph context without ceremony.
- [ ] US2 — Expose advisory kickoff state without breaking workflow compatibility: add stable machine-readable advisory state fields.
- [ ] US3 — Gracefully degrade kickoff on sparse repos and ambiguous tasks: preserve honest guidance instead of noisy context.

Full stories: `docs/themes/TH6-precision-governed-advisory-kickoff/epics/E3-freedom-preserving-kickoff-controls/stories/`
